pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh which explicitly creates and uses this directory.
Code analysis reveals no computation of RMSE in the evaluation scripts (export_result.sh, verifier.py) or project source. The value is not used.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves fixing mathematical logic bugs in a recommender system located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/recommender_system. The environment uses a small synthetic dataset for movies and ratings created during setup. The evaluation does not calculate RMSE or use the claimed expected_rmse_threshold of 1.5. Instead, it uses a hidden script to independently verify the implementation logic of the calculate_cosine_similarity, get_top_k_neighbors, and predict_score functions using specific hardcoded test vectors.
